sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36081" key="e)nspe/rmatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνσπέρμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possessing seed,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phan.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
